_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Detect and analyze encrypted data, stenography, alternate data streams and other forms of concealed data.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data protection law, including GDPR, CCPA/CPRA, and sector-specific privacy regulations, with emphasis on the legal bases for processing, data subject rights, cross-border transfer mechanisms, and enforcement precedent.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-K-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-K-002 (RC, cosine: 0.448), RC-K-006 (RC, cosine: 0.446).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.4/10 (raw 0.237). Shared vocabulary: [data]. DCWF-only terms [alternate, analyze, concealed, detect, encrypted, forms] vs WIDAI-only terms [bases, border, ccpa, cpra, cross, emphasis] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.845 (P=0.858, R=0.833). P exceeds R by 0.025 — the DCWF element's 15 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 29 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.4%). "Detect and analyze encrypted data, stenography, alternate data streams and other" and "Knowledge of data protection law, including GDPR, CCPA/CPRA, and sector-specific" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.467 > STS 0.237 (gap +0.230). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.7%. Shared tokens: [data]. DCWF-only: [alternate, analyze, concealed, detect, encrypted, forms]. WIDAI-only: [bases, border, ccpa, cpra, cross, emphasis].
